empty.subtitle: There are no habits for today.
empty.title: No habits

message.delete-habit: Are you sure to remove the habit:
message.delete-execution: Are you sure to remove this execution?
message.change-goal: Do you want to change the goal?
message.contact: Fill out the form to contact the app's author.
message.support:
Hey there!

I’m building Dooit on my own, with strong belief that it can truly improve everyday life. Every line of code was written to help you build habits that make a real difference.

If you feel that Dooit has supported you in some way, I’d appreciate it a lot if you contributed to its development - even with a virtual coffee. It’s a sign for me that what I’m doing matters.

~ Mikołaj Bryksa

contact.rate-limit: You've reached the daily limit (3 messages).

addStep.habitName: What do you want to do regularly?
addStep.repeatDays: On what days you want to do it?
addStep.repeatHours: What time do you want to do it?

step2.which-habits: which habits you want to build

step3.accept-default: or keep the default repetition settings

start.subtitle: Hi, {{userName}}
start.title: Let’s get started
start.text:
For each habit,
just make one choice:
do it or skip it.

lastChance:
Count 5, 4, 3, 2, 1 and take action!

Mel Robbins shows that a quick countdown forces your brain to act immediately, before excuses can take over.

Take at least one small step today.

BJ Fogg emphasizes that even minimal actions build habits and increase your chances of success in daily life.

Imagine how your future self will thank you.

Hal Hershfield demonstrates that visualizing the consequences of your decisions increases the satisfaction of taking action.
good: One good habit leads to another.
Another brick in the wall of success.
Each action shapes who you become.
You’re building the best version of you.
Great choice, your routine is working.
bad: One slip doesn’t erase your progress.
Learn from it, then move forward.
It’s a stumble, not a failure.
Your habit is stronger than this moment.
One skip is not the end.
It’s just a break, not a setback.
It’s just a pause, your journey continues.

summary.subtitle: All done today!
